about.heading: Passionate about quality, driven by precision.
about.bio1: I'm Rao Muhammad Ali, an SQA Engineer with a strong foundation in manual and automated testing. I specialize in identifying defects early, building robust test frameworks, and ensuring that software meets the highest quality standards before it reaches end users.
about.bio2: My approach combines analytical thinking with a deep understanding of the software development lifecycle. I work closely with development teams to integrate quality assurance at every stage, from requirements review to post-release monitoring.
about.bio3: I'm passionate about ensuring software quality through meticulous testing and continuous improvement.
about.skillsSubheading: Expertise in quality assurance and testing methodologies.
